LSE-HS11-L4-1400P-HSSCIENG1112-RCC-GBL-01 • HS Science & Engineering Design Grade 11 • Quantifying Design Criteria

The Council's Measure

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the teacher's lesson was about, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he said, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what makes an argument judgeable.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS HS-ETS1-1  |  HS Science & Engineering Design Grade 11: Quantifying Design Criteria
